title: random things/stuff
description:
random things i added with blockbench for models and mcreator 
this adds new ore mobs bosses blocks tools items and much much more
body:
i made this mod cuz i was bored and didnt know what to do 

this adds random things i tought would be cool
it contains:
new boss (matthew)
new boss stuff
matthew sword
matthew pickaxe
matthew leg

new biome (grass biome)
grass biome stuff
grass sword
grass human
grass pig
grass pork chop

another boss (fleshman)

new ore
Modrinthenium ore
raw modrinthenium
modrinthenium ingot
modrinthenium pickaxe
modrinthenium axe
modrinth wrench (best ingame item)
modrinthenium armor
modrinthenium block

this mod also adds a robot which is kinda cool
and a very annoying parody of the cave dweller mod (doesnt spawn naturally dw)
and a lot more of stuff
